title: Client BulletRenderManager (singleton + BulletS2CPacket handling: create/update/destroy render objects)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1233-1256 (BulletRenderManager design: client singleton, manages BulletRenderObjects, create/update/destroy on packet)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L2018-2022 (Client packet handling: new creates, existing updates, missing destroys)
acceptance_criteria: BulletRenderManager is a client-side singleton, obtained via BulletManager.getClientLevel(Level) or equivalent client accessor
Maintains a Map<Integer, BulletRenderObject> keyed by bulletId

On BulletS2CPacket received: new bullet IDs -> create BulletRenderObject with position/direction/style; existing IDs -> update position (store old as prevPosition) and direction; missing IDs (not in packet but in map) -> destroy render object
getRenderObject(int bulletId) API returns BulletRenderObject reference for onVisualTick hooks
Clears all render objects on level change / player disconnect
Packet handler registered in ModularShootPackets connected to BulletRenderManager
